6_segment_geo.segment_note: Subscription/support is 80.2% of total revenue — high recurring base. Product revenue +31.1% YoY. FCF margin 26.2% (Q3 is seasonally mid-range; Q1 tends to be highest due to annual billings). RPO $18.4B (+36.0% YoY) provides forward revenue visibility.
6_segment_geo.geo_note: Geographic breakdown not available in supplemental data. Full geo breakdown requires the 10-Q filing.

7_margin.driver_note: Non-GAAP gross margin 75.8% (-20bps YoY). Non-GAAP OI margin 27.1% (-30bps YoY). GAAP OI margin -6.1% (-1570bps YoY). FCF margin 26.2%.

key_signals.q4_eps_vs_q3_actual: Q4 midpoint $0.97 vs Q3 actual $0.85 — step-up of $0.12
key_signals.credibility_read: PANW has a consistent track record of conservative guidance and beating. See transcript for management tone.

9_estimate_revisions.note: No prior analyst model maintained. EPS trajectory shown instead of old-vs-new table.
9_estimate_revisions.direction: FY26 guidance raise. Q4 FY26 implied $0.970 based on FY26 guidance midpoint $3.78 minus 3-quarter actuals.

10_valuation.note: No DCF. Peer NTM EV/Revenue multiples used for PT range.

ntm_build.assumption: FY27 estimated at +15% YoY from FY26 actuals

peer_table.note: Premium multiple reflects faster growth and ARR recovery
Margin leader; lower multiple reflects more hardware-oriented mix
EV not pre-staged; revenue miss this quarter notable

10_valuation.rationale: PANW trades at 22.4x TTM and 18.8x NTM EV/Revenue at the Jun 2 close of $297.18. Applying 10.0–12.0x NTM (discount to CRWD's 34.18x reflects PANW's lower growth rate of ~31.1% vs CRWD's ~23.0%) yields PT range $158–$189. Midpoint $174 implies +-41.4% upside from post-earnings close.

11_rating.rationale: EPS beat of +6.2% and FY26 guidance raise (midpoint $3.78) support the thesis. Q4 EPS guidance midpoint $0.97 vs Q3 actual $0.85. Stock fell 4.4% AH. Platform metrics: NGS ARR +60.0%, 2280 platformized customers, RPO $18.4B (+36.0% YoY). PT $174 based on 10.0–12.0x NTM EV/Revenue (-41.4% upside). Q&A sentiment: 9 bullish / 0 bearish / 0 neutral exchanges.
key_risks: Platformization velocity slows if customer consolidation pace disappoints
CRWD competitive recovery intensifies and captures consolidation deals
NGS ARR growth decelerates as large customer base matures
FY27 growth outlook uncertain if macro conditions soften enterprise security spend
FCF margin trajectory dependent on billings timing and M&A integration costs
